Free technology grants and discounts available for nonprofits.

Free technology grants and discounts available for nonprofits. Get started

Nonprofit offers

Power your nonprofit with free technology grants and custom-built solutions for nonprofits.
Get started Download offers guide

Our most popular nonprofit offers

Get grants and discounts across our cloud products, including Azure, Dynamics 365, Microsoft 365, and more.

Microsoft 365

Microsoft 365 with Microsoft Teams can help your nonprofit improve cybersecurity, reduce costs, and empower staff and volunteers to work from anywhere.
Explore Microsoft 365 offers

Azure

Optimize costs and rapidly scale nonprofit operations while improving operational stability and network resilience.
Explore Azure offers

Dynamics 365 and Power Platform

Engage donors and volunteers and manage organizational operations with business applications powered by AI-driven insights.
Explore Dynamics 365 & Power Platform offers

Enable your team's day-to-day work

Reduce costs, improve security, and enable remote work with Microsoft 365 and Microsoft Surface devices.
Learn more about Microsoft 365 Learn more about Surface

Microsoft 365 Business Basic

Productivity suite with web and mobile versions of Microsoft 365 apps (Outlook, Teams, Word, Excel, PowerPoint, and more), Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat, essential security features, 1TB of cloud storage per user, and support for free up to 300 users—all designed to help nonprofits work smarter and safer.

See plans & pricing

Microsoft 365 Business Premium

Work securely from anywhere with desktop, web, and mobile versions of Microsoft 365 apps, Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat, and enterprise-grade security and access management for $5.50 (USD) per user/month, paid yearly.

See plans & pricing

Microsoft 365 E3

Includes unified endpoint, identity, and access management, powerful productivity apps like Microsoft Teams and Windows for Enterprise, plus enhanced security, cloud storage, and web‑connected AI chat.

See plans & pricing

Microsoft 365 E5

Combines unified endpoint, identity, and access management with best‑in‑class productivity apps like Microsoft Teams and Windows for Enterprise, along with advanced security and analytics, cloud storage, and web‑connected AI chat.

See plans & pricing

Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat

Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat provides secure AI chat and is included in your Microsoft 365 subscription at no extra charge. Get started today to easily visualize data, brainstorm new ideas, draft content, and quickly find what you need.

Get started

Microsoft 365 Copilot

Streamlines tasks, enhances productivity, and integrates with your existing applications, making it ideal for nonprofits. Easily simplify and automate processes with custom or pre-built agents. Available as an add-on at a discounted price of $25.50 (USD) per user/month, paid yearly.

Learn more Contact us

Microsoft 365 F3

Best for nonprofits with field staff and volunteers that need access to email, cloud storage, Microsoft Teams, and simple device management in a secure, all-in-one solution. Available at a discounted price of $2 (USD) per user/month.

Get started

Windows 11 Professional

Full version of Windows 11 Professional, with down level rights for Windows 10 Professional. Grants of up to 50 licenses available through TechSoup and discounted pricing for additional licenses through any Cloud Solution Provider (CSP).

Learn more about Windows 11

Secure your mission

Microsoft Defender Suite for Microsoft 365 Business Premium

Enterprise-grade threat protection tailored for small and medium size organizations, including advanced endpoint security, email protection, identity governance, and cloud app security. Available as an add-on at a discounted price of $4 (USD) per user/month, paid yearly.

Get started

Microsoft Purview Suite for Microsoft 365 Business Premium

Simplifies data security, compliance, and governance with capabilities like Insider Risk Management, Information Protection and Governance, and eDiscovery and Audit. Available as an add-on at a discounted price of $4 (USD) per user/month, paid yearly.

Get started

Microsoft Defender and Purview Suites for Microsoft 365 Business Premium (combined)

A comprehensive, cost-effective solution for security and compliance needs, tailored for small and medium size organizations. Available as an add-on at a discounted price of $6 (USD) per user/month, paid yearly.

Get started

Microsoft Entra Suite

Secure every login with strong identity and access controls—ideal for nonprofits with frequent staff and volunteer turnover—ensuring only the right people access sensitive systems and data. Available as an add-on at a discounted price of $4.80 (USD) per user/month, paid yearly.

Get started

Microsoft 365 Intune

Secure and manage staff and volunteer devices from one place, protecting data across personal and shared equipment and enabling reliable hybrid and field‑based work. Available as an add-on at a discounted price of $4.00 (USD) per user/month, paid yearly.

Get started

Visualize data and measure impact

Data is essential to your success. Get the tools you need to analyze your data and measure your impact with Microsoft Power BI.
Learn more about Power BI

Power BI Desktop

Create rich, interactive reports with visual analytics at your fingertips—for free.

Power BI Pro

Gain 360° real-time views of your data, access Power BI desktop features, distribute content, and more for $3 (USD) per user/month.

Optimize operations with cloud migration

Find best-in-class Azure infrastructure built to scale with your organization’s needs. Optimize costs while increasing agility and securely protecting workloads across a hybrid environment.
Learn more about Azure

Annual Azure Grant

Leverage $2,000 (USD) Azure services credits per year and access the complete portfolio of Azure products and cloud services. Sign up for the Nonprofit Azure Onboarding Concierge and Success Center to set up your credits.

Sign up

Windows Server and SQL Server 2008 and 2012 EOS

Move Windows Server 2012/R2 services and SQL Server 2012 databases to Azure to receive extended security updates for three years after EOS, move Windows Server 2008/R2 and SQL Server 2008 to receive one additional year of EOS.

Read the blog

Azure Hybrid Benefit

Significantly reduce the cost of running your workloads in the cloud by transitioning your on-premises Software Assurance enabled Windows Server and SQL Server licenses to Azure with this licensing benefit. This benefit now also applies to RedHat and SUSE Linux subscriptions.

Learn more

Reservations

Receive a discount on your Azure services by purchasing one-year or three-year reservations. Plus, enjoy monthly payment options at no extra cost and save more when you combine reservations with Azure Hybrid Benefit.

Get started

Modernize processes and manage constituents

Drive deeper engagement with your stakeholders, modernize your financial systems, and build agile organizational processes with Microsoft Dynamics 365.
Learn more

Power Apps

With the extensibility to connect to hundreds of other business systems, databases, and other apps, Power Apps can make app development more efficient and secure. Now free for up to 10 users and discounted pricing of $2.50 (USD) per user/month for additional users.

Dynamics 365 Sales

Enable relationship management for your constituents, volunteers, and beneficiaries with Dynamics 365 Sales, starting at $16.25 per user/month, paid yearly.

Connect with a partner

Dynamics 365 Customer Service

Scale service operations with Dynamics 365 Customer Service, starting at $12.50 per user/month, paid yearly.

Connect with a partner

Dynamics 365 Business Central

Transform nonprofit operations with Dynamics 365 Business Central, a comprehensive business management solution that connects finance, operations, supply chain, and programs. Available at a discounted price of $32.00 (USD) per user/month.

Nonprofit industry solutions

Nonprofit industry solutions enable global organizations to accelerate mission outcomes by connecting Microsoft's integrated cloud capabilities to the most common nonprofit scenarios. Explore solutions for fundraising, grant management, volunteer management, program impact, and more. 
Browse nonprofit solutions
